rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0001
rows.name:
Earth was destroyed after being
caught in a battle between aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0002
rows.name:
At that moment, humanity
should have shared its fate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0003
rows.name: Are those your true feelings!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Then why did you join the Earthlife
Colonization Project, Lao-san!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Why did you become a crew
member of the White Whale!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Because I believed that plan
would save all of humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0007
rows.name:
No... it was obvious to everyone that saving
all ten billion people was impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0008
rows.name: But even so... race, nationality, religion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0009
rows.name:
I believed the desire to save people
across those barriers was real.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0010
rows.name:
That's why the world lent its strength
to the Earthlife Colonization Project![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0011
rows.name: That is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0012
rows.name: But in reality[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0013
rows.name:
It was a plan to gather the whole world's power and wealth,
then let only the [System:Ruby rt=elite ]humans[/System:Ruby] of the leading nations escape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0015
rows.name: Do you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0016
rows.name:
The only ordinary people of different nationalities
or races who boarded the White Whale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0017
rows.name:
It was only us, gathered as crew
to maintain the immigrant ship.[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0018
rows.name:
The many others[ST:wide ]— the immigrant group
still sleeping in the Central Life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0019
rows.name:
Were people chosen because they were
meant to be chosen from the start![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0020
rows.name: That's[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0021
rows.name: Elma, you knew, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0022
rows.name:
I won't say there weren't
people chosen arbitrarily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0023
rows.name:
Even so, I cooperated because I thought it
was more meaningful than doing nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0024
rows.name: Nationality, race, wealth, talent...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0025
rows.name:
Those walls dividing people are
merely definitions people created.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0026
rows.name:
Viewed at the genetic level, they
are only very slight differences.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0027
rows.name:
They're not slight differences!
Not to Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0028
rows.name: You couldn't understand, Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0030
rows.name:
No... there's no need to lump
all Earthlings together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0031
rows.name: These are my feelings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0032
rows.name:
Even if only a handful
of people were saved...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0033
rows.name:
Saying humanity should have
perished along with Earth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0033_2
rows.name: That's not like you at all, Lao-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0034
rows.name: It's wrong![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0035
rows.name: Lin, my wife and daughter[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0035_2
rows.name: They died when Earth was destroyed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0037
rows.name: Earth, humanity... none of that matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0038
rows.name:
I joined the Earthlife Colonization
Project to save my family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0039
rows.name:
No[ST:wide ]— there was no guarantee that my family
would be chosen just because I participated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0040
rows.name:
If they weren't chosen, and were fated to
disappear... then when that time came[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0040_2
rows.name: we vowed to accept it with calm hearts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0041
rows.name:
But still, there was hope, however
small! Hope that they might be chosen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0042
rows.name: I bet on that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0043
rows.name:
But the project's upper
echelons, from the start...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0044
rows.name:
Had no intention of choosing the handful of
people to be saved from the whole world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0044_02
rows.name:
Those bastards did it to save the
[System:Ruby rt=elite ]humans[/System:Ruby] of their own countries...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0045
rows.name: That's wrong, Lao.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0046
rows.name: What is wrong!? How is it wrong!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm the only one who survived[ST:wide ]— There
was no hope from the beginning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0048
rows.name:
I couldn't do anything for
Charmaine or Chenshi![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0049
rows.name:
Can you understand how I felt when I learned that
truth later!? Can you understand our feelings!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Even if it was a plan to arbitrarily
save only some Earthlings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0051
rows.name: It is better than saving no one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0052
rows.name: That is how I think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0053
rows.name: So, Lao[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0053_2
rows.name:
Your feelings that drive you to lend your strength to the
Growth, who are trying to destroy the people who were saved...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0054
rows.name: I cannot sympathize with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0062
rows.name: That's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11090100_MSG0062_2
rows.name: I'm not expecting anyone to understand![ST:wait ]
